Gate (failed)
  - Verification profile: full
  - Latest gate: failed — one or more integration gate commands failed
  - Last failure: cargo test gate --quiet (exit 1)
Repair (auto)
  - State: repairable: daemon policy can run integration repair

  - Run: running
